      "それは、キリストの磔刑の出来事に関連する他の聖人や人々の像を含んでいます。",
      "それは、磔刑の5人の証人を含んでいます。",
      "それは、証人たちと共に隅にある2つの小さな像を含んでいます。",
      "それは、6人の天使を含んでいます。",
      "それは、祭壇の足元にある6人の人物の損傷した絵を含んでいます。",
      "それは、頂上に集まった10人の天使を含んでいます。",
      "それは、一番上に神の手を含んでいます。",
      "それは、右側にある小さな鳥の像を含んでいます。"

      "それは、1100年頃に作成されました。"

    "CreatedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "CreatedFor": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "CreatedIn": [
      "それは、ウンブリアで作成されました。"
    ],
    "CreatedTo": [
      "それは、描かれた出来事の意味を教えるために作成されました。",
      "それは、人々の信仰を強めるために作成されました。"
    ],

      "不明"
    ],
    "DevelopedIn": [
      "不明"
    ],

      "不明"
    ],

    ],

    "HasA": [
      "それは、キリストの頭上にラテン語の碑文があります。",
      "それは、近くのサン・ダミアーノ教会に元の場所のレプリカがあります。",
      "それは、古いサン・ダミアーノ教会の祭壇の上に掛けられているコピーがあります。",
      "それは、祭壇の足元にある6人の人物の損傷した絵があります。",
      "それは、一番上に神の手があります。",
      "それは、右側にある小さな鳥の像があります。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは、直立したキリストの主要な姿が特徴です。",
      "それは、より小さな周りの人物たちが特徴です。",
      "それは、暗い赤と黒の周りのものと対照的な明るい白い体であることが特徴です。",
      "それは、「ナザレのイエス、ユダヤ人の王」という碑文が特徴です。",
      "それは、磔刑の5人の証人が特徴です。",
      "それは、聖母マリアとマグダラのマリアが極度の悲しみと苦悩を反映するために頬に手を当てていることが特徴です。",
      "それは、4人の証人が光輪で表されていることが特徴です。",
      "それは、証人たちと共に隅にある2つの小さな像が特徴です。",
      "それは、横木の両端に配置された6人の天使が特徴です。",
      "それは、祭壇の足元にある6人の人物の損傷した絵が特徴です。"
    ],

    "KnownFor": [

About: It is about the commission received by St. Francis of Assisi to rebuild the Church.
It is about the incident of Christ's crucifixion.
It is about the meaning of the event depicted and strengthening the faith of the people.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with St. Francis of Assisi.
It is associated with the Basilica of Saint Clare.
It is associated with the church of San Damiano.
It is associated with Franciscans.
It is associated with the Eastern Church.
It is associated with Montenegro.
It is associated with Croatia.
It is associated with Umbria.
It is associated with Cimabue.
It is associated with Giotto.
ConsistsOf: It consists of the main figure of Christ.
It consists of images of other saints and people related to the incident of Christ's crucifixion.
It consists of five witnesses of the crucifixion.
It consists of two smaller figures in the corners with the witnesses.
It consists of a damaged picture of six figures at the foot of the cross.
It consists of ten angels crowded around the top.
It consists of the Hand of God at the very top.
It consists of a small figure of a fowl on the right side.
CreatedAround: It was created around the year 1100.
CreatedTo: It was created to teach the meaning of the event depicted.
It was created to strengthen the faith of the people.
HasA: It has an inscription in Latin above the head of Christ.
It has a replica in its original position in the church of San Damiano nearby.
It has a copy hanging over the altar of the ancient church of San Damiano.
It has a damaged picture of six figures at the foot of the cross.
It has the Hand of God at the very top.
It has a small figure of a fowl on the right side.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the main figure of Christ represented upright in full stature.
It is characterized by surrounding figures that are smaller.
It is characterized by the bright white of his body contrasting with the dark red and black around it.
It is characterized by the inscription Jesus of Nazareth, King of the Jews.
It is characterized by five witnesses of the crucifixion.
It is characterized by Mary and Mary Magdalene having their hands placed on their cheeks to reflect extreme grief and anguish.
It is characterized by four witnesses represented with halos.
It is characterized by two smaller figures located in the corners with the witnesses.
It is characterized by six angels positioned at both ends of the crossbar.
It is characterized by a damaged picture of six figures at the foot of the cross.
HeldIn: It was held in the Basilica of Saint Clare.
It was held in the chapel of San Damiano.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the tradition of painted crucifixes that began in the Eastern Church.
It was influenced by the Byzantine style common in Italy before Cimabue and Giotto.
IsA: It is a large Romanesque rood cross.
KnownAs: It is known as an icon cross.
It is known as the symbol of the Franciscan mission from God.
It is known as a symbol of their mission to commit their lives and resources to renewing and rebuilding the Church.
KnownFor: It is known for St. Francis of Assisi praying before it and receiving the commission to rebuild the Church.
LocatedIn: It is located in the Basilica of Saint Clare in Assisi, Italy.
It is located in the church of San Damiano nearby.
It is located in the chapel of San Damiano just outside Assisi.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the 11th century in Umbria.
UsedAs: It is used as a symbol of the Franciscan mission from God.
It is used as a symbol of their mission to commit their lives and resources to renewing and rebuilding the Church.
UsedFor: It is used for teaching the meaning of the event depicted.
It is used for strengthening the faith of the people.
UsedIn: It is used in the Basilica of Saint Clare.
It is used in the church of San Damiano.
